news.headline: IRAN HAS AGREED TO HOLD A FOURTH ROUND OF INDIRECT NUCLEAR TALKS WITH THE US ON SUNDAY IN OMAN, TASNIM NEWS REPORTS, CITING MEMBER OF IRAN TEAM

news.summary: A company based in Fornebu, Norway, Aker Horizons ASA, has announced a change in the maturity date for their bond loan with the ISIN NO0010923220. The original maturity date of 15 August 2025 has been revised to 23 May 2025. The redemption price for the bond is set at 100.37% of the Nominal Amount, plus any accrued and unpaid interest on the redeemed amount.
news.headline: Aker Horizons ASA will fully redeem bond loan ISIN NO0010923220 on May 23, 2025 at 100.37% of the Nominal Amount.

news.summary: Pittsburgh-based Alcoa Corporation (NYSE: AA; ASX: AAI) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.10 per share for its common stock and Series A convertible preferred stock. The dividend is set to be paid on June 6, 2025, to shareholders of record as of May 20, 2025. Alcoa is a prominent player in the global bauxite, alumina, and aluminum sector with ambitions to transform the industry for long-term sustainability.
news.headline: Alcoa Corp declares $0.10 quarterly cash dividend per share, to be paid on June 6, 2025, to stockholders of record on May 20.

news.summary: As of May 9, 2025, women have the option to self-collect samples at home without the need for a speculum. These samples can then be mailed to a certified lab for testing using the same method as in a doctor's office, ensuring equal accuracy. Teal Health®, a women's health company based in San Francisco, has introduced this innovative approach to facilitate health screenings among women.
news.headline: FDA approves Teal Health's Teal Wand™, 1st at-home self-collection device for cervical cancer screening, offers comfort with no need for speculum, maintaining accuracy. Women can now collect samples at home and mail for testing at certified lab.

news.summary: Canada Nickel Company Inc. revealed today the successful completion of a US$20 million bridge loan orchestrated by Ber Tov Capital Corporation. The agreement, finalized on May 9, 2025, marks a significant milestone for Canada Nickel, as it secures additional funding to support its operations. The loan was facilitated by BT Capital and is expected to bolster the Company’s financial position in the foreseeable future. Canada Nickel, listed on the TSXV under the ticker symbol CNC and on the OTCQX as CNIKF, continues to strengthen its standing in the market through strategic financial decisions.
news.headline: Canada Nickel secures US$20M bridge loan with BT Capital, providing financial boost.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, legal firm Halper Sadeh LLC launched an investigation into multiple companies for possible breaches of federal securities laws and fiduciary duties. One of the companies under scrutiny is Shutterstock, Inc. (NYSE: SSTK), concerning its sale transaction. The investigation aims to assess if shareholders' rights were compromised.
news.headline: Halper Sadeh LLC is investigating SSTK, RDUS, ICAD, TURN for violations on behalf of shareholders. (Numbers not provided)

news.summary: In May 9, 2025, in Delray Beach, Florida, it was reported that the worldwide market for Artificial Intelligence (AI) in Healthcare was worth approximately US$14.92 billion in 2024. Experts project a significant growth trajectory for this market, with a forecasted Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 38.6%. The market is expected to reach US$21.66 billion by 2025 and a substantial US$110.61 billion by 2030. This growth is driven by various factors such as...
news.headline: Global AI in Healthcare market valued at US$14.92B in 2024, to grow at 38.6%, reaching US$21.66B in 2025 and US$110.61B by 2030.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, a law firm known as Halper Sadeh LLC announced that they are conducting an inquiry into multiple companies suspected of violating federal securities laws or breaching fiduciary responsibilities to their shareholders. One of these companies under investigation is PHX Minerals Inc. (NYSE: PHX), which is currently in the process of being sold. The investigation aims to determine whether shareholders were unfairly impacted by this transaction and if any laws were broken in the process.
news.headline: Investor rights law firm investigating PHX, HOFV, ASST, AZEK for potential violations.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, CME Group Inc. disclosed the initial shareholder voting outcomes from its 2025 annual meeting. Key highlights included the election of individuals such as Terrence A. Duffy, Kathryn Benesh, Timothy S. Bitsberger, Charles P. Carey, and Bryan T. Durkin. The company, traded on NASDAQ under the symbol CME, shared these details following the meeting.
news.headline: CME Group Inc. releases preliminary results from 2025 shareholders' meeting; key figures include election of board members.

news.summary: Renowned tech investor and ARK Invest CEO, Cathie Wood, reiterated her optimistic outlook on Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) in a recent statement. Wood also highlighted potential challenges for Palantir Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: PLTR) and Alphabet, Inc. (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL). ARK Invest has been decreasing its stake in Palantir, selling approximately $80 million in shares this week. Palantir now accounts for 6.62% of ARK's portfolio, totaling $324.4 million. Wood mentioned Palantir's robust government sector performance during an interview on CNBC's Squawk Box.
news.headline: Cathie Wood bullish on Bitcoin and Tesla, cautious on Palantir and Google; ARK Invest sold $80M of Palantir shares, now 6.62% of portfolio worth $324.4M.

news.summary: The post highlights the effectiveness of Portfolio Armor's top ten names strategy during market rallies, indicating a superior average return of 17.03% over six months compared to 10.75% for the SPDR S&P 500 Trust. The article emphasizes the importance of identifying whether the current market phase is a bear market rally or a new bull market to guide investment decisions. The spotlight is on two of Portfolio Armor's past top picks, Groupon, Inc. and D-Wave Quantum, Inc., which surged approximately 42% and 51% respectively in response to positive earnings reports on Thursday. The data-driven success of these picks suggests a reconsideration of the bear market rally strategy, potentially advocating for a shift towards bullish options trades on top names.
news.headline: Portfolio Armor's top ten names have averaged 17.03% returns since Dec 2022 vs SPY's 10.75%. 2 top names surged ~42% & ~51% due to earnings reports.

news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas on May 9, 2025, Cook Children's shared deep worry about an imminent crisis jeopardizing healthcare access for the most at-risk children in Texas. The crisis impacts a significant 1.8 million children and expectant mothers across the state, of which 125,000 fall under the care of Cook Children's.
news.headline: Cook Children's in Fort Worth, Texas, voices concern about health care access for 1.8 million children statewide.

news.summary: In a significant move to enhance local emergency response capabilities, Morgan County in West Virginia has chosen INdigital as its provider for Next Generation Core Services (NGCS) for 911 service delivery. The decision, announced on May 9, 2025, signifies a major step towards modernizing the county's emergency services. Through this partnership, Morgan County aims to improve its emergency response systems by incorporating advanced NGCS technology provided by INdigital.
news.headline: Morgan County, WV, partners with INdigital for NG 911 core services; advancing emergency response capabilities.

news.summary: A new report on the United Kingdom social commerce market projects significant growth in the coming years. The market is anticipated to increase by 22.7% annually, reaching a total of US$49.21 billion by 2025. The report provides detailed insights into social commerce trends across various end-use sectors, operational KPIs, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics. This growth reflects the strong momentum in the UK's social commerce sector.
news.headline: UK social commerce market to reach US$49.21 billion in 2025, growing by 22.7% annually. Key players include Facebook, Instagram, TikTok.

news.summary: In Denver on May 9, 2025, Nate Gilbert transitioned from being a CPA to diving into the software industry due to his strong belief in the efficiency of modern enterprise systems, particularly no-code development technology. His experience and vision led him to make this career shift, acknowledging the potential of these emerging platforms.
news.headline: Entrepreneur Nate Gilbert transitioned from CPA to software and founded a fire department solution on Nextworld platform.
Terms set for Riksbank auctions of government bonds.

news.summary: Plains All American Pipeline, L.P. (NASDAQ: PAA) saw a decline in share prices as they released their first-quarter earnings report. They reported a revenue of $12.011 billion, falling short of the expected $14.26 billion consensus. The adjusted earnings per share (EPS) stood at 39 cents, below the anticipated 43 cents. However, the company's adjusted EBITDA, attributable to PAA, demonstrated a 5% year-over-year increase, reaching $754 million. The Crude Oil Segment's adjusted EBITDA also saw growth, rising by 1% year-over-year to $559 million, attributed to higher tariff volumes, escalations, and gains from acquisitions. Additionally, the NGL segment's adjusted EBITDA surged by 19%. For more details, refer to the article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Plains All American Pipeline's Q1 revenue was $12.011B, missing consensus of $14.26B. Adjusted EBITDA rose 5% to $754M.
SWISS PRESIDENT KELLER-SUTTER: INTEREST BY U.S. IN SWISS INVESTMENT, NUMBER OF ABOUT 150 BILLION SWISS FRANCS IS CORRECT

news.summary: Ethereum (ETH) has seen a significant 20% surge in the past 24 hours, reaching $2,343. This extends a two-week rally of 32%. Despite this increase, it remains 52% below its all-time high of $4,878.26 in November 2021. The rally is seen as reflecting renewed confidence in Ethereum's long-term importance within the blockchain ecosystem. Experts, such as Steve Milton from Fintopio, believe this rally shows Ethereum's internal strength and its role in the crypto ecosystem, rather than being solely driven by institutional investments. This surge highlights Ethereum's prominence in decentralized finance (DeFi), Layer-2 scaling solutions, and smart contracts, emphasizing its fundamental value in the market.
news.headline: Ethereum surges 20% in 24 hours, trading at $2,343, up 32% in two weeks. Still 52% below ATH of $4,878.26. Experts point to internal strength and long-term role in blockchain ecosystem driving the rally. More focus on DeFi, layer-2 scaling solutions, and smart contracts reflecting in investor behavior.

news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ forecasts the global Industrial Reels market to see significant growth. Starting at USD 0.50 billion in 2025, the market is projected to hit USD 0.62 billion by 2030, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.4%. This steady growth trend is expected to continue with a CAGR of 4.4% in the coming years.
news.headline: Global Industrial Reels market set to grow at 4.4% CAGR, reaching $0.62 billion by 2030, up from $0.50 billion in 2025.
Swiss President Keller-Sutter: We have the impression the US is seeking tailor-made solutions with individual nations.
Swiss Economy Minister Parmelin: The Chinese delegation will come for second round of trade talks in July.
Swiss Economy Minister Parmelin: Trade talks with the Chinese addressed in bilateral, the objective is to advance quickly.

news.summary: AMC Networks, Inc., listed under NASDAQ as AMCX, released their fiscal first-quarter 2025 results last Friday. They reported a 6.9% year-over-year decrease in quarterly revenue, totaling $555.23 million, which was below the analyst consensus of $569.37 million. The company's adjusted earnings per share (EPS) stood at 52 cents, marking a 55.2% decline from the previous year and missing the analyst estimate of 80 cents. In terms of domestic operations, affiliate revenue dropped by 12% to $156 million as a result of basic subscriber reductions. More information can be found on the Benzinga.com platform.
news.headline: AMC Networks reports Q1 results: Revenue down 6.9% to $555.23M, adjusted EPS falls 55.2% to 52 cents. Stock slides on no subscription growth.

news.summary: In a recent collaboration, an InsurTech leader and a wholesaler have partnered to implement integrations aimed at enhancing speed to market. The InsurTech company, Vertafore®, known for its cutting-edge insurance technology, granted XPT Specialty the prestigious 2025 Speed to Market Innovator Award. This recognition was announced in Denver on May 9, 2025, during the annual user event of the InsurTech leader. The award showcases XPT Specialty's commitment to driving innovation in the insurance industry, emphasizing the importance of quick market responsiveness.
news.headline: Vertafore names XPT Specialty the 2025 Speed to Market Innovator for driving speed to market integrations.
Swiss President Keller-Sutter: The pause on tariffs is not to be lifted during negotiations.
China Commerce ministry Statement: Russia and China had in-depth exchange on bilateral cooperation and responding to US tariffs.

news.summary: The Family Wealth Report Awards recognize outstanding achievements in catering to the Family Office, Family Wealth, and Trusted Advisor sectors. Held in Chicago on May 9, 2025, the event highlighted the exceptional performance of HUB Private Client, a division under HUB International specializing in addressing insurance and risk management requirements. This prestigious accolade underscores their dedication to serving these vital communities.
news.headline: HUB Private Client named Best Insurance Brokerage in 2025 Family Wealth Report Awards for the second year in a row.

news.summary: A unique well-being event is being hosted by Blue Zones Project Riverside in Riverside, California on Saturday, May 17th from 9:45 a.m. to 1 p.m. at the Riverside Municipal Airport. The event is open to the entire community and aims to celebrate community, connection, and overall well-being. Admission is free, and attendees can look forward to engaging in various activities focused on health and wellness. This event is expected to draw a large crowd and is geared towards promoting a healthy lifestyle across the community.
news.headline: Blue Zones Project Riverside hosts well-being festival on May 17 from 9:45 a.m. to 1 p.m. at Riverside Municipal Airport.

news.summary: E&R Engineering Corp. will be participating in SEMICON Southeast Asia 2025 at the Sands Expo & Convention Centre in Singapore from May 20 to 22. The company, with a strong 30-year presence in the semiconductor sector, will showcase its latest innovations at the event.
news.headline: E&R showcases advanced solutions at SEMICON SEA 2025 with partners in Singapore. Over 30 years of experience in semiconductor industry.

news.summary: In Irvine, California on May 9, 2025, Warren Street Wealth Advisors has revealed a significant development by partnering with Connor Garnett, ranked in the top five PPA singles pickleball players. The collaboration signifies a major advancement for Warren Street as they progress in their endeavors.
news.headline: Warren Street Wealth Advisors partners with top PPA singles pickleball player Connor Garnett, elevating the firm’s profile.

news.summary: The NAMM Fly-In event gathered over 90 prominent companies from all 50 states to discuss important music industry matters with elected officials. This event took place in Carlsbad, California on May 9, 2025. NAMM, the largest worldwide non-profit organization for music merchants, organized this initiative.
news.headline: NAMM's successful advocacy for music education included Fly-In with 90+ companies from all states, meeting officials in D.C.

news.summary: A panel of ten judges including Gabriele Muccino, Caleb & Shelby Ward, Caroline Ingeborn, Charlie Fink, Denise Negri, Dave Clark, Filippo Rizzante, Guillem Martinez Roura, Paolo Moroni, and Rob Minkoff, will review the shortlisted movies focusing on creativity, production excellence, and utilization of Artificial Intelligence technology.
news.headline: Jury for Reply AI Film Festival announced to judge AI-generated short films; includes Gabriele Muccino and 10 others.

news.summary: Today in Beijing, Hanxiang Studio introduced LEGEND BATTLES, an advanced Battle Royale game app aiming to provide an immersive gaming experience. This next-generation AAA game is set to launch on STEAM in June 2025. LEGEND BATTLES offers hyper-realistic gameplay and accessibility for all players.
news.headline: Next-gen Battle Royale game LEGEND BATTLES on UE 5.5 across 400 km2 area, launching on STEAM in June 2025.

news.summary: Utah's business transaction ecosystem is undergoing diversification as indicated by a rise in financial services consolidation and professional services integration, moving beyond the tech sector. The annual Deal Flow Report released by MountainWest Capital Network (MWCN) on May 9, 2025 revealed significant developments. This shift is reflected in increasing numbers of mergers and acquisitions within the financial and professional services industries, showcasing a dynamic transformation in the state's business landscape.
news.headline: Utah services companies lead post-pandemic M&A surge in 2024, diversifying beyond tech. - Report by MWCN.

news.summary: Marlborough, MA – On May 9, 2025, Scopic, a prominent player in bespoke software development, revealed its recent purchase of ZoomRadar, a pioneer in real-time weather data and radar graphics. This acquisition aims to enhance the provision of weather services to enterprises.
news.headline: Scopic acquires ZoomRadar, enhancing weather data services. Acquisition boosts real-time radar visualization for businesses.

news.summary: 350 residents of New York attended an event on May 5th organized by Jericho Project, a leading nonprofit focused on eradicating homelessness. The event aimed to raise support for providing stable housing and essential services to those in need.
news.headline: Jericho Project Gala to end homelessness gathered 350 New Yorkers to provide stable housing and services for neighbors in need.

news.summary: A renowned national property management company, Drucker + Falk (DF), has made substantial contributions to three organizations dedicated to supporting the Asian American and Pacific Islander (AAPI) community. This initiative coincides with the celebration of AAPI Heritage Month and aims to raise awareness about the culture and challenges faced by the AAPI population. The donations from DF are set to benefit the organizations in their efforts to empower and uplift the AAPI community. This move reflects DF's commitment to social responsibility and supporting marginalized groups.
news.headline: Drucker + Falk donates to 3 AAPI organizations for AAPI Heritage Month. Va-based company supports community.

news.summary: Fairmint, based in New York, revealed on May 9, 2025, its introduction of a regulatory-compliant onchain cap table solution aimed at improving settlement efficiency and operational transparency in the private securities markets. The enterprise-grade onchain infrastructure provided by Fairmint enhances cap table management processes.
news.headline: Fairmint launches onchain cap table solution for private securities markets, enhancing efficiency and transparency.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, in Charlotte, North Carolina, the CEO of Ally Financial Inc. (NYSE: ALLY), Michael Rhodes, is scheduled to speak at the Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference on May 30, 2025, around 10:00 a.m. ET. The event will be live-streamed on the day of the conference.
news.headline: Ally Financial CEO to speak at Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference on May 30, 2025, at 10:00 am ET. Live webcast available.

news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of May 9, 2025, the worldwide In Vitro Diagnostics Market was valued at US$100,769.3 million in 2024. Projections indicate a strong growth forecast, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.6%. It is expected to reach US$109,065.5 million in 2025 and a significant US$157,632.5 million by 2030. This growth is driven by the increasing prevalence of...
news.headline: Global In Vitro Diagnostics Market to reach US$157,632.5 million by 2030 with 7.6% CAGR growth from US$100,769.3 million in 2024.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, Infrrd, a leading global player in Intelligent Document Processing (IDP), has recently been acknowledged as a top Leader and Star Performer in the IDP Products PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2025 by Everest Group. This recognition follows a detailed assessment of 29 prominent IDP vendors. Infrrd has notably elevated its standing, establishing itself as a key player in the IDP field. This accolade underscores its growth and success within the Intelligent Document Processing realm.
news.headline: Infrrd named Leader and Star Performer by Everest Group in IDP, among 29 vendors. Strengthened position in IDP PEAK Matrix 2025.

news.summary: Olympic sprinting champion and well-known chocolate brand collaborate to encourage fans to take their time and enjoy the present with the launch of the "It's Slow Good" campaign. Turtles®, the classic caramel nut cluster established in 1916, reveals the latest initiative to promote savoring moments. The campaign aims to remind consumers to slow down and appreciate life's simple pleasures.
news.headline: Turtles® partners with Sha'Carri Richardson for "It's Slow Good" campaign promoting to savor the moment.

news.summary: A recent collaboration between WK Kellogg Co and Meijer has resulted in a $25,000 donation through Mission Tiger™ to bolster athletic programs at five schools in Battle Creek, Michigan. This initiative aims to support young student athletes in the Detroit area and ensure they have access to quality athletic opportunities. The generous contribution will have a significant impact on the development of sports programs at these schools, ultimately benefitting the next generation of athletes.
news.headline: WK Kellogg Co and Meijer donate $25,000 through Mission Tiger™ to enhance sports programs at five schools in Detroit.
